masthead_subtitle: WEEKLY DISPATCHES FROM THE WORLD'S WEIRD CORNERS
prestige_confirm_body: Lore Inheritance carries forward. The next age is bigger than newsstands. Government denials, alien abductions, men in black sedans — and they still cannot quite tell us what's out there.
reveal_placeholder_text: A new lens points at something the locals already knew about.
prestige_ready_toast: The networks are calling. Cut the show whenever you're ready.
